name: IPregistry Blog
description: Official blog for IPregistry covering IP geolocation, threat intelligence, DNS, and related topics.
notes: No RSS or Atom feed URL discovered on the blog page or via common feed paths (/blog/rss, /blog/feed, /feed, /blog/rss.xml). The blog is a static/custom site with no discoverable machine-readable feed.
